area: Team Agents / plan actor and mutation clarity
finding: `team plan` without `--actor` used stale `AGENT_IDENTITY=codex-gpt-5.4-mini` instead of the active task claim actor `Codex-GPT5.6 Sol`; it also registered a proposal-first provisional write lease during a command operators reasonably read as dry-run planning.
expectedBehavior: Team plan should prefer the active claim actor, report any identity mismatch before broker evaluation, and state clearly whether plan mutates broker leases; a truly read-only planning option should be available.
evidenceOrRepro: Fixed in TASK-AAO-0195: `resolveTeamPlanActorId` prefers active claim; `team plan --read-only` skips registry persist and softens proposal-first.
